mapper.select: SELECT * FROM festival_info f WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM FESTIVAL_THEMES m WHERE m.content_id = f.content_id ) AND f.overview IS NOT NULL

SELECT f.content_id, f.title, f.overview, f.region_code, f.modified_time, (SELECT LISTAGG(t.theme_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY t.theme_name) FROM FESTIVAL_THEMES ft JOIN THEME_MASTER t ON ft.theme_code = t.theme_code WHERE ft.content_id = f.content_id) as themes FROM festival_info f WHERE f.overview IS NOT NULL AND (f.INDEXED_MODIFIED_TIME IS NULL OR f.modified_time > f.INDEXED_MODIFIED_TIME)
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT content_id, title, overview, first_image FROM festival_info WHERE addr1 LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%' AND overview IS NOT NULL ORDER BY modified_time DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT f.content_id, f.title, f.overview, f.first_image FROM festival_info f WHERE f.overview IS NOT NULL ORDER BY f.modified_time DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FESTIVAL_LIKE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{member_id} AND CONTENT_ID = #{content_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE festival_info SET overview = #{overview,jdbcType=CLOB}, homepage = #{homepage,jdbcType=CLOB}, sponsor1_tel = #{sponsor1_tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, spon_place = #{spon_place,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, use_time_festival = #{use_time_festival,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE content_id = #{content_id}
